name: HRC_MESSAGE_ATTACHMENTS
description: This is the table where attachment information of each communication messages will be stored. The attachment information will be stored as base64.

columns.Name: ATTACHMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Unique Id for the file attached as part of communication process

columns.Name: COMMUNICATION_ID
columns.Comments: Unique Id for identifying the communication message

columns.Name: FILE_NAME
columns.Comments: Indicates the name of the attached file.

columns.Name: CONTENT
columns.Comments: Content of the attachment in base64 format.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ATTACHMENT_KEY
columns.Comments: Unique key for the file attached as part of communication process

columns.Name: MIME_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indicates the type of attachment and content type of attachment.

columns.Name: FOLDER_PATH
columns.Comments: Indicate the path of the folder structure where the attachment is stored.

columns.Name: VERSION
columns.Comments: Indicates the version number of the file attached via the communication process.

columns.Name: ATTACHMENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indicate the type of the attachment whether ucm or fnd etc.

columns.Name: ATTACHMENT_SIZE
columns.Comments: Indicates the value of the size of attachment given

columns.Name: URI
columns.Comments: Indicates the value of uri or url given as part of the communication process

columns.Name: DO_SENDER_HAVE_ACCESS
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the sender is having access for this specific attachment or not.
